shell.title: ZClaw Setup
shell.subtitle: Complete the steps below to connect your assistant.
check.title: Let's make sure your assistant can reach OpenClaw
check.subtitle: We will verify config access, real-time connection, and authentication so the next setup steps are smooth.
check.wsManaged: Connection is being managed by GatewayProvider.
check.tokenNeeded: Authentication is required. Enter your OpenClaw token and reconnect. Device credentials are generated automatically.
check.tokenExists: Great, token already exists for this session. Device credentials remain managed automatically.
check.tokenEnvHint: You can provide the gateway token via NEXT_PUBLIC_OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN.
model.title: Choose the brain for your assistant
model.subtitle: Choose the primary model from the models currently available through your gateway. Your selection is saved to OpenClaw as the active default.
model.keyHint: Your key is only used for Test in this step. Continue is enabled after a successful test.
model.emptyState: No selectable models are available yet. Make sure OpenClaw has models configured, then refresh this step.
model.modelNameHint: This selection becomes the active primary model used by onboarding and the dashboard.
model.testSuccess: Test passed. You can continue and save this provider as primary model.
model.testFailed: Test failed. Verify provider and key, then run Test again.
model.saveSuccess: Primary model saved to OpenClaw config.
model.saveFailed: The selected primary model was not updated.
zalo.title: Pair your Zalo channel when you're ready
zalo.subtitle: Connect now for immediate message delivery, or skip this step and finish setup first.
zalo.botTokenHint: If Zalo is not configured or not paired yet, save a bot token first.
zalo.botTokenHintLink: How to create a Zalo bot token
zalo.botTokenSaveError: Failed to save Zalo bot token.
zalo.pairingGuideHint: Paste the full message from Zalo bot. We will send it to the main OpenClaw agent and wait for execution response.
zalo.pairingGuidePlaceholder:
OpenClaw: access not configured.

Your Zalo user id: ...
Pairing code: ENZMB3K8

Ask the bot owner to approve with:
openclaw pairing approve zalo ENZMB3K8
zalo.approvalRequestHint: Paste the approval prompt from OpenClaw. We extract command data and send approval automatically.
zalo.approvalRequestPlaceholder:
Need your approval to run this exact command:

openclaw pairing approve zalo Q2ACK6WB

Approve with:
/approve 009f15c0 allow-once

Or allow it permanently with:
/approve 009f15c0 allow-always
complete.title: You're ready to enter your dashboard
complete.subtitle: Quick review before handoff: your model and Zalo connection status are shown below.
